text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Light Hello once watched as the role<n>model she
adored failed to ever reach<n>center stage at a
winning concert,<n>despite countless hours of
training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Those bitter memories fuel Hello's<n>present work.
As we're handing out<n>flyers one day, I spot a
student<n>glaring at us with anger in her eyes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Silence Suzuka is<n>agonizing over
something Agnes<n>Tachyon said. What do concerts
mean to her, and what does that have<n>to do with
her running?
